---
title: "Outreach & Science Communication"
---

I believe in making science accessible beyond academia. I frequently contribute to media outlets and educational projects.

## The Conversation

I am a recurring author at **The Conversation**, an independent source of news and views from the academic and research community.

[![](https://cdn.theconversation.com/static/tc/au/profile_header_logo.png){width=200}](https://theconversation.com/profiles/guilherme-maricato-2548754)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Follow my work
Check out my full profile and latest articles on **[The Conversation](https://theconversation.com/profiles/guilherme-maricato-2548754)**.
:::

### Selected Articles

* **[Título do Artigo Mais Recente Aqui]**
    * *Summary or teaser of the article...*
    * [Read article →](LINK_DO_ARTIGO)

* **[Título do Outro Artigo Aqui]**
    * *Summary or teaser...*
    * [Read article →](LINK_DO_ARTIGO)

---

## Other Projects

* **Siga Chapéu de Bruxa** (2021-2022)
    * A science communication series about the "Flipper" dolphins of Rio de Janeiro.
    * [Read more](LINK)

* **Marine Biodiversity Guide** (2019)
    * Co-authored the chapter on Whales and Dolphins for the "Islands of Rio" guide.
